## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and plan new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance:** The "Expense & Financial Management" cluster grew 63% in sessions, validating a key content bet. Overall traffic is steady, likely due to seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** An FAQ page will be built to capture AI Overview placements, a tactic validated by a competitor's success. Kyle will provide requirements by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [**Product Launch:** The NGINX card launch is now a public waitlist (Q1 full launch). Messaging will shift from rewards to integration/control, per user survey data.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [**Process Update:** Joel will now approve all new content topics before production to prevent wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Seasonality

  - [**Performance:** Overall traffic is steady with incremental growth.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
      - [**Highlight:** The "Expense & Financial Management" cluster grew 63% in sessions, validating a key content bet.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [**Seasonality:** The team is investigating seasonal trends to inform strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** A slowdown is expected from now through December, aligning with construction industry layoffs in cold weather.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [**Conflicting Data:** One source suggests October is a busy month; another's research shows construction permits decrease in winter.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**Action:** Joel will ask Rory (AI tool builder) for new research on seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

### AI Overview & FAQ Strategy

  - [**Opportunity:** A competitor's FAQ page appeared in a Google AI Overview, signaling a viable strategy for capturing this placement.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Build a user-friendly FAQ page to capture AI Overview placements.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The page must be useful for humans to ensure long-term value, not just optimized for bots.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
      - [Kyle will draft technical requirements for the FAQ page.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [Carrie will provide a list of questions from sales calls (Airtable).](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Joel's team will build the page using the provided requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### NGINX Product Launch

  - [**Launch Plan:** The NGINX card launch is now a public waitlist, not limited to direct bill customers.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Waitlist may launch tomorrow; full public release is in Q1.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [**Messaging Shift:** User survey data revealed that better integration and controls are stronger motivators than rewards (e.g., "up to 10% back").](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**Action:** Joel will share survey results to guide content strategy, pending internal approval.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [**CTA:** The team will test a "join the waitlist" CTA, while exploring more compelling alternatives.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)

### Content Production & Process

  - [**Production Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [Recent content backlog is cleared.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
      - [10 new articles are ready for review.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
      - [3 more articles will be ready tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [**Process Change:** Joel will now approve all new content topics before production begins.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents wasted effort on topics that may not align with strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
      - [**Workflow:** Carrie will submit topics via the standard content review process.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kyle:** Draft technical requirements for the FAQ page → Deliver by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [**Carrie:** Share the Airtable link with FAQ questions → Deliver ASAP.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [**Joel:**](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)

      - [Share NGINX survey results with the team (pending approval).](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=1115.0)
      - [Review the 10 new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [**growthx.ai Team:** Submit new content topics for Joel's approval.](https://fathom.video/share/cmF-a9s9Js7ueQzE-HdDSaL3AwYGz-zk?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)
